title: Eggless right down to the buttercream — Rosehill and Camellia orders welcome
summary:
Some bakeries call it eggless when only the sponge skips eggs. The buttercream, the ganache, the fondant — check again.

At Num Nums, every layer is 100% eggless. Not most cakes. Every cake, every finish, every time. That's why Rosehill and Camellia families keep driving past the closer options to Wigram Street.

Six sizes, 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Ferrero Rocher. 48 hours minimum notice — that's what fresh, made-to-order actually takes.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. We speak Hindi and Gujarati too.
keywords: eggless buttercream and ganache not just sponge
Rosehill and Camellia custom cake pickup
is the frosting eggless too Parramatta
